title: never-stale per-project opt-in marker
description: Presence of this file (with enabled:true) at <project root>/.claude/ is how the plugin-owned hooks know to act in this project. .claude/never-stale.json is committed (team-shared); .claude/never-stale.local.json is gitignored (machine-local, and overrides the committed one). A corrupt or missing marker is treated as DISABLED.

enabled.description: Must be exactly true for the hooks to act. Anything else = disabled.

version.description: never-stale version that wrote this marker, e.g. "0.6.0".

spoken.description: Spoken-reply language recorded at scaffold time (informational; the rule itself lives in CLAUDE.md).

written.description: Default written-file language recorded at scaffold time (informational).

events.description: Per-event switches. Omit an event or set true to keep it on; set false to turn just that reminder off.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the marker was written (informational).
